name: A664VLConfig
title: A664VLConfig
syntax: long A664VLConfig (a664Frame aFrame, dword RxFlags, dword TxFlags, dword BagValue, dword MaxFrameSize, dword SkewMax) (1)
long A664VLConfig (a664Message aMessage, dword RxFlags, dword TxFlags, dword BagValue, dword MaxFrameSize, dword SkewMax) (2)
description: Configure a Virtual-Link for a given a664Frame or a664Message.

parameters.name: RxFlags
parameters.description: Control integrity checking (IntChk: bit position 0) and redundancy management (RMA: bit position 1).

parameters.name: IntChk
parameters.description: 0 set integrity checking to OFF 1 set integrity checking to ON

parameters.name: RMA
parameters.description: 0 set redundancy management to OFF 1 set redundancy management to ON

parameters.name: TxFlags
parameters.description: Control the selected line (LineSelect: bit position 0, 1) and IP fragmentation (IpFragAllowed: bit position 2).

parameters.name: LineSelect
parameters.description: 0 use existing value from LineSelect for transmission 1 transmit on line A 2 transmit on line B 3 transmit on both lines

parameters.name: IpFragAllowed
parameters.description: 0 fragmentation not allowed 1 fragments are allowed

parameters.name: BagValue
parameters.description: Give the BAG for this VL.

parameters.name: MaxFrameSize
parameters.description: Give the maximum Ethernet frame size MaxFrameSize for this VL.

parameters.name: SkewMax
parameters.description: This is the maximum timely difference between a transmission on line A and B. The value SkewMax is considered for Rx direction only.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
